title: Greetings & Introductions
description: Learn how to greet people and introduce yourself in Malay.

grammar.title: Basic Sentence Structure
grammar.explanation: Malay sentences follow Subject-Verb-Object order, just like English. There are no articles (a/an/the) and no verb conjugations for tense.

dialogue.speaker: Siti
dialogue.english: I'm fine. What is your name?

dialogue.speaker: Ali
dialogue.malay: Nama saya Ali. Saya dari Kuala Lumpur.
dialogue.english: My name is Ali. I am from Kuala Lumpur.

dialogue.speaker: Ali
dialogue.english: Nice to meet you! See you again!

exercise.question: How do you say 'Good morning' in Malay?
